programs.name: Gentle Fit
programs.description: Seeking a class with a more relaxed pace to improve your fitness? Using gentle movements and low-intensity level exercises, workouts will include both  cardio and muscle conditioning options.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional - Beginner
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Walk Fit
programs.description: Walking is a great form of exercise for everyone. Combining basic steps with upper body movements, Walk Fit offers both cardio and conditioning benefits.

programs.name: Paper Piecing Panel
programs.description: Discover the art of hand-sewn paper piecing in this workshop. Perfect for beginners, this class introduces you to the foundations of paper piecing - a technique that uses a printed template to create precise, intricate quilt blocks with ease. You'll learn how to read and assemble paper piecing patterns, sew accurately on the line, manage seam allowances and acheive sharp geometric design. Step-by-step, you'll create beautiful blocks that can be combined into a small quilt project, wall hanging or cushion cover. Material fee of $15 (cash only), payable to instructor for practice materials. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Dance: Belly Dance
programs.description: Known for its energetic and expressive movements, belly dancing engages the whole body. Learn to use your hips, hands and torso through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Soccer: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this soccer activity, you will learn basics like kicking, passing and heading as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Yoga: Chair
programs.description: Gain all the benefits of yoga with the added support of a chair or your walker. Combining gentle stretches and traditional poses, you will improve your flexibility, strength, breathing and relaxation with every movement.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Soccer: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this soccer activity, you will learn basics like kicking, passing and heading as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Pickleball: Recreational
programs.description: Develop skills though play with recreational pickleball. Players of all levels can register to join the fun and participate in structured scrimmages or small-sided games where staff will ensure rules are followed and participation is balanced. There is no formal instruction.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Needle Felting
programs.description: Takes loos fibres and transforms them into beautiful and tactile art using a specialized needle. Students will be introduced to different needle-felting tools, the basics of using the needles, some handy safety tips, and how to mix colours. Students will be provided 2-D templates to create. This workshop requires an additional $20 material fee (cash only), payable to the instructor for practice materials. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Pilates
programs.description: Build core strength and improve flexibility with this head-to-toe workout. As you progress through slow-paced movements, performed in sequence, you will learn to incorporate an awareness of the spine and breath in this complete approach to well being.

programs.name: Soccer: Recreational
programs.description: Develop skills though play with recreational soccer. Players of all levels can register to join the fun and participate in structured scrimmages or small-sided games where staff will ensure rules are followed and participation is balanced. There is no formal instruction.

programs.name: Tai Chi
programs.description: Embrace the body and mind through the practice of tai chi . Learn how to pair gentle movements that you will perform in a sequence with controlled breathing, to improve your flexibility, coordination, strength and mental concentration.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Workshop: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Are you looking for focused classes with a shorter time commitment? This workshop is for jewellery making enthusiast. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.

programs.name: Yoga with Family
programs.description: Do you like the idea of participating in physical activity with your family? Relax your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your families balance, breathing, flexibility and strength. Each individual must register for this activity.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional - Beginner
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.description: Make a splash with lessons to improve your swim skills. Learn how to enter and exit the pool, go underwater, breathe effectively and float with assistance.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.
programs.location: The Elms Cmty School and Pool

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.
programs.location: Wexford Collegiate School for the Arts

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.
programs.location: Wexford Collegiate School for the Arts

programs.name: Ultra Swim 5
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front dive, forward roll and front crawl. Learn back crawl, eggbeater kick and elementary backstroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 75 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 4.
programs.location: The Elms Cmty School and Pool

programs.name: Ultra Swim 5 - Small Group
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front dive, forward roll and front crawl. Learn back crawl, eggbeater kick and elementary backstroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 75 metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 6
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and eggbeater kick. Learn stride entries, surface dives, breaststroke and interval training. Work towards a continuous swim of 150 metres. This activity is for all girls.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 5.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 7
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives, eggbeater kick, front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and breaststroke. Learn shallow dives into deep water and treading water while fully clothed. Work towards a continuous swim of 200 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 6.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 7
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop surface dives, eggbeater kick, front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and breaststroke. Learn shallow dives into deep water and treading water while fully clothed. Work towards a continuous swim of 200 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 6.

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: Gentle Fit
programs.description: Seeking a class with a more relaxed pace to improve your fitness? Using gentle movements and low-intensity level exercises, workouts will include both  cardio and muscle conditioning options.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional - Beginner
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Walk Fit
programs.description: Walking is a great form of exercise for everyone. Combining basic steps with upper body movements, Walk Fit offers both cardio and conditioning benefits.

programs.name: Paper Piecing Panel
programs.description: Discover the art of hand-sewn paper piecing in this workshop. Perfect for beginners, this class introduces you to the foundations of paper piecing - a technique that uses a printed template to create precise, intricate quilt blocks with ease. You'll learn how to read and assemble paper piecing patterns, sew accurately on the line, manage seam allowances and acheive sharp geometric design. Step-by-step, you'll create beautiful blocks that can be combined into a small quilt project, wall hanging or cushion cover. Material fee of $15 (cash only), payable to instructor for practice materials. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Dance: Belly Dance
programs.description: Known for its energetic and expressive movements, belly dancing engages the whole body. Learn to use your hips, hands and torso through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Soccer: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this soccer activity, you will learn basics like kicking, passing and heading as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Yoga: Chair
programs.description: Gain all the benefits of yoga with the added support of a chair or your walker. Combining gentle stretches and traditional poses, you will improve your flexibility, strength, breathing and relaxation with every movement.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Soccer: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this soccer activity, you will learn basics like kicking, passing and heading as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Pickleball: Recreational
programs.description: Develop skills though play with recreational pickleball. Players of all levels can register to join the fun and participate in structured scrimmages or small-sided games where staff will ensure rules are followed and participation is balanced. There is no formal instruction.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Needle Felting
programs.description: Takes loos fibres and transforms them into beautiful and tactile art using a specialized needle. Students will be introduced to different needle-felting tools, the basics of using the needles, some handy safety tips, and how to mix colours. Students will be provided 2-D templates to create. This workshop requires an additional $20 material fee (cash only), payable to the instructor for practice materials. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Pilates
programs.description: Build core strength and improve flexibility with this head-to-toe workout. As you progress through slow-paced movements, performed in sequence, you will learn to incorporate an awareness of the spine and breath in this complete approach to well being.

programs.name: Soccer: Recreational
programs.description: Develop skills though play with recreational soccer. Players of all levels can register to join the fun and participate in structured scrimmages or small-sided games where staff will ensure rules are followed and participation is balanced. There is no formal instruction.

programs.name: Tai Chi
programs.description: Embrace the body and mind through the practice of tai chi . Learn how to pair gentle movements that you will perform in a sequence with controlled breathing, to improve your flexibility, coordination, strength and mental concentration.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Workshop: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Are you looking for focused classes with a shorter time commitment? This workshop is for jewellery making enthusiast. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.

programs.name: Yoga with Family
programs.description: Do you like the idea of participating in physical activity with your family? Relax your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your families balance, breathing, flexibility and strength. Each individual must register for this activity.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional - Beginner
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.
programs.location: The Elms Cmty School and Pool

programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Adult Swim 3
programs.description: Build endurance in the water one stroke at a time. Develop staying afloat in water and stroke improvement. Work towards a continuous swim of 100 to 300 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 2.

programs.name: Adult Swim 3
programs.description: Build endurance in the water one stroke at a time. Develop staying afloat in water and stroke improvement. Work towards a continuous swim of 100 to 300 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 2.
programs.location: The Elms Cmty School and Pool

programs.name: Cardio: High/Low
programs.description: Do you love aerobic exercise?  With the ability to choose between high and low-impact movements, in this workout, you decide what works best for you to improve your overall fitness.

programs.name: Dance: Ballroom
programs.description: Get ready to glide across the dance floor with ease. Learn basic steps, postures and holds of various dance styles like the waltz, foxtrot, tango, rumba and quick step through various exercises and engaging choreography.Partners are not required as dancers will be partnered in this class as needed.

programs.name: Dance: Line Dance
programs.description: Are you ready to step up your dance skills with line dancing? Using basic steps to create repetitive combinations, you'll learn moves like the shuffle, grapevine, coaster step and mambo step through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Music: Guitar - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the guitar with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.

programs.name: Music: Guitar - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the guitar with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Music: Guitar - Tri Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the guitar with a three-to-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the keyboard with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the piano with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes.

programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the piano with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes.

programs.name: Music: Ukulele - Private

programs.name: Pottery
programs.description: Create with clay. Learn the basics of pottery including how to shape and sculpt with your hands and tools to create and finish 3D forms.

programs.name: Gentle Fit
programs.description: Seeking a class with a more relaxed pace to improve your fitness? Using gentle movements and low-intensity level exercises, workouts will include both  cardio and muscle conditioning options.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional - Beginner
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Walk Fit
programs.description: Walking is a great form of exercise for everyone. Combining basic steps with upper body movements, Walk Fit offers both cardio and conditioning benefits.

programs.name: Paper Piecing Panel
programs.description: Discover the art of hand-sewn paper piecing in this workshop. Perfect for beginners, this class introduces you to the foundations of paper piecing - a technique that uses a printed template to create precise, intricate quilt blocks with ease. You'll learn how to read and assemble paper piecing patterns, sew accurately on the line, manage seam allowances and acheive sharp geometric design. Step-by-step, you'll create beautiful blocks that can be combined into a small quilt project, wall hanging or cushion cover. Material fee of $15 (cash only), payable to instructor for practice materials. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Dance: Belly Dance
programs.description: Known for its energetic and expressive movements, belly dancing engages the whole body. Learn to use your hips, hands and torso through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Soccer: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this soccer activity, you will learn basics like kicking, passing and heading as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Yoga: Chair
programs.description: Gain all the benefits of yoga with the added support of a chair or your walker. Combining gentle stretches and traditional poses, you will improve your flexibility, strength, breathing and relaxation with every movement.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Soccer: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this soccer activity, you will learn basics like kicking, passing and heading as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Pickleball: Recreational
programs.description: Develop skills though play with recreational pickleball. Players of all levels can register to join the fun and participate in structured scrimmages or small-sided games where staff will ensure rules are followed and participation is balanced. There is no formal instruction.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Needle Felting
programs.description: Takes loos fibres and transforms them into beautiful and tactile art using a specialized needle. Students will be introduced to different needle-felting tools, the basics of using the needles, some handy safety tips, and how to mix colours. Students will be provided 2-D templates to create. This workshop requires an additional $20 material fee (cash only), payable to the instructor for practice materials. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Pilates
programs.description: Build core strength and improve flexibility with this head-to-toe workout. As you progress through slow-paced movements, performed in sequence, you will learn to incorporate an awareness of the spine and breath in this complete approach to well being.

programs.name: Soccer: Recreational
programs.description: Develop skills though play with recreational soccer. Players of all levels can register to join the fun and participate in structured scrimmages or small-sided games where staff will ensure rules are followed and participation is balanced. There is no formal instruction.

programs.name: Tai Chi
programs.description: Embrace the body and mind through the practice of tai chi . Learn how to pair gentle movements that you will perform in a sequence with controlled breathing, to improve your flexibility, coordination, strength and mental concentration.

programs.name: Yoga
programs.description: Relax your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Workshop: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Are you looking for focused classes with a shorter time commitment? This workshop is for jewellery making enthusiast. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.

programs.name: Yoga with Family
programs.description: Do you like the idea of participating in physical activity with your family? Relax your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to improve your families balance, breathing, flexibility and strength. Each individual must register for this activity.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional - Beginner
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.
programs.location: The Elms Cmty School and Pool

programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Adult Swim 3
programs.description: Build endurance in the water one stroke at a time. Develop staying afloat in water and stroke improvement. Work towards a continuous swim of 100 to 300 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 2.

programs.name: Adult Swim 3
programs.description: Build endurance in the water one stroke at a time. Develop staying afloat in water and stroke improvement. Work towards a continuous swim of 100 to 300 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 2.
programs.location: The Elms Cmty School and Pool

programs.name: Cardio: High/Low
programs.description: Do you love aerobic exercise?  With the ability to choose between high and low-impact movements, in this workout, you decide what works best for you to improve your overall fitness.

programs.name: Dance: Ballroom
programs.description: Get ready to glide across the dance floor with ease. Learn basic steps, postures and holds of various dance styles like the waltz, foxtrot, tango, rumba and quick step through various exercises and engaging choreography.Partners are not required as dancers will be partnered in this class as needed.

programs.name: Dance: Line Dance
programs.description: Are you ready to step up your dance skills with line dancing? Using basic steps to create repetitive combinations, you'll learn moves like the shuffle, grapevine, coaster step and mambo step through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Music: Guitar - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the guitar with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.

programs.name: Music: Guitar - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the guitar with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Music: Guitar - Tri Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the guitar with a three-to-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the keyboard with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the piano with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes.

programs.name: Music: Piano - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the piano with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes.

programs.name: Music: Piano - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the piano with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes.

programs.name: Music: Piano - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the piano with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes.

programs.name: Music: Ukulele - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the ukulele with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn proper hold, strumming, finger picking and chords.Equipment: You must bring your own ukulele.

programs.name: Pottery
programs.description: Create with clay. Learn the basics of pottery including how to shape and sculpt with your hands and tools to create and finish 3D forms.

programs.description: Create with clay. Learn the basics of pottery including how to shape and sculpt with your hands and tools to create and finish 3D forms.

Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: CampTO
programs.description: CampTO is a fun and creative all-day experience. Enjoy games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. Water play or swim days will also be enjoyed, dependent on weather and camp location.
